hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'sqlite3' && echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'workflow\.db'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct workflow database modification is prohibited. Use the hook scripts."}}'; exit 0; fi
